## Checklist

- [ ] `make validate` passes locally
- [ ] `make test` passes locally
- [ ] Signed commits (GPG or SSH)
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Tests added or updated (if applicable)
